message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>In the context of adequate reactions to the current Covid-19 pandemic, Seifried, Ciesek et al. [6, 5] have proposed the application of SARS-CoV-2 pool testing in the pursuit of increasing testing capacity. We show how this method can be substantially improved in realistic scenarios, and we point out a possible impact on the ongoing discussion concerning the need of increased testing as a complementary measure to relaxed restrictions.</jats:p>
title: Increasing Virus Test Capacity via Recursive Pool Testing with an Application to SARS-CoV-2 Testing

reference.unstructured: Eleanor Bird. Pooling samples could accelerate new coronavirus testing. https://www.medicalnewstoday.com/articles/pooling-samples-could-accelerate-new-coronavirus-testing, 2020.
